Galactosemia Tests

Galactosemia Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a galactosemia test? 
A galactosemia test is a blood test given to newborns to check for a rare genetic metabolic disorder called galactosemia. Metabolic disorders affect metabolism, the process your body uses to make energy from the food you eat.
